violations.text: 3 bay sink was observed leaking from discharge pipe. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was less than 50 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023

Knife was held in the clean knife rack had an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023

Corn and cheese were observed held at between 87-127 degrees Fahrenheit at the hot hold warmer. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge food item was held for more than 2 hours such as cheese will voluntarily disposed of. Corn was held for less than 1 hour send to reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023

Ambient refrigeration unit was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Non TCS food items were observed stored on unit at the time of the inspeciton. Service will be called. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023

Mango boxes, single use utensils, take out containers, water bottle were observed stored on the floor in the storage room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023
Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023
ice cream spoons were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023

A knife was observed stored on an unclean surface between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023
Water was observed stoked in blenders. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the ( ) sanitizing solution for the ( ). New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023
The mop sink plumbing is in poor repair. observed leaking. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Direct connection is observed draining in a container. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back door, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2023

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2023
